name: part_004
file: tmp_【Ayunda Risu 3D Birthday】The Rise of the NUT Warrior 【#TheNutWarrior】 [VYSAfYJ6FhI]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_004.webm

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu (The Nut Warrior) meets IRyS (The Keeper) in a dungeon to receive the legendary Nut Blade.
Ayunda Risu and IRyS perform a high-energy dance to 'Dragon Screamer'.
IRyS bestows the Nut Blade upon Risu after her performance.
A map of the world appears as Risu narrates her next steps in the quest.
